caption: A blonde woman with her hair pulled back in a ponytail is captured in a medium shot against a solid purple background. She is wearing a black t-shirt with the text "WHO'S IN YOUR" printed in white, though the words below it are partially cut off by the frame. A small, tan-colored headset microphone is visible near her cheek. Throughout the sequence, the woman remains centered in the frame, facing slightly to the right. Her expression evolves from a slight, closed-mouth smile to a more neutral, attentive look. She blinks and makes subtle shifts in her facial muscles and head position, suggesting she is listening to someone off-screen. There are no other people or objects visible in the scene, and the lighting remains consistent across the duration of the clip.
